subject: 2025-2026 pledge statement from UU Church
message:
Please review your attached 2025-2026 pledge statement as of 3/10/2026. We depend on your support to accomplish our vision and mission in Houston.

Thanks for your support!
Tapestry Unitarian Universalist Church of Houston
I am sending this at the request of the Treasurer, Dawn.
